title: Fit-Me

buildability.reason: Uses standard Shopify Admin API and App Extension to pull order data and display recommendations, enabling a 3‑person team to ship a functional v1 within 10 weeks.

speedToRevenue.reason: App is available in Shopify App Store, merchants can install and start receiving size recommendations immediately, and can subscribe in the first billing cycle.

wedge.reason: Provides instant, data‑driven size recommendations that reduce returns and improve conversion.

distribution.reason: Targeted DTC brands can be reached through Shopify App Store and content marketing, fitting the $50K–$2M revenue range.

trapRisk.reason: No high‑risk features; relies on standard APIs and data analysis, safe for a small team.

expansion.reason: Model can scale to additional product lines and add features like predictive sizing for new SKUs, enabling growth to €1M without pivot.

technicalSnapshot: The app uses Shopify Admin API to fetch order and exchange data, stores a size‑confidence model in a backend database, and exposes recommendations via a Shopify App Extension on the product page using App Bridge. It also uses Shopify Billing API for subscription and Shopify App Store for distribution.

v1Plan.day3: Set up Shopify app skeleton, register app, create basic UI, set up billing, and design data model skeleton.
v1Plan.week3: Implement data ingestion from Admin API, compute a simple size recommendation algorithm, expose via App Extension on product page, and test with sample data.
v1Plan.week10: Deploy production, add confidence scoring, integrate with Shopify App Store, add analytics, finalize billing, and launch.
